steps.title: Build the length model
steps.content:
The original chain is $33$ centimeters long. Each added segment has length $8-r$, and $x$ segments are added, so
$$
f(x)=33+x(8-r)
$$

steps.title: Calculator shortcut
steps.content: For example, if $r=3$, the added length is $5$ each time, giving values $33$, $38$, and $43$ for $x=0$, $1$, and $2$. This matches the distributed model. The answer is B.
